title: Sundamomum flavoalbum

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Sundamomum flavoalbum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Sundamomum flavoalbum is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
